  "title": "Senior Infrastructure Engineer",
  "description": "BlueChip Technologies is a leading business application firm focused exclusively on assisting organizations in planning, designing, implementing and operating business application solutions and strategies that are central to creating and maintaining a competitive business advantage.

We are recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Infrastructure Engineer

Job Location: Lagos

Key Responsibilities


	Maintain servers, networks, storage systems
	Manage cloud &amp; hybrid infrastructure
	Ensure availability, scalability &amp; disaster recovery
	Troubleshoot critical infra issues
	Design and manage enterprise IT infrastructure &amp; cloud environments
	Cloud (AWS/Azure), networking, virtualization.


Qualifications


	7 years of experience as an infrastructure engineer.


Core Skills


	Reliable and scalable IT backbone
	Business Impact.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@bluechiptech.biz using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Senior Infrastructure Engineer Job at BlueChip Technologies




        
    

        
        BlueChip Technologies is a leading business application firm focused exclusively on assisting organizations in planning, designing, implementing and operating business application solutions and strategies that are central to creating and maintaining a competitive business advantage.

We are recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Infrastructure Engineer

Job Location: Lagos

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Maintain servers, networks, storage systems
	Manage cloud & hybrid infrastructure
	Ensure availability, scalability & disaster recovery
	Troubleshoot critical infra issues
	Design and manage enterprise IT infrastructure & cloud environments
	Cloud (AWS/Azure), networking, virtualization.


Qualifications


	7 years of experience as an infrastructure engineer.


Core Skills


	Reliable and scalable IT backbone
	Business Impact.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

job Location: Lagos

	Integrate credit scoring, KYC, payment systems
	Monitor product performance &amp; adoption
	Drive product strategy for credit/fintech platforms (lending, scoring, risk)
	Product management, fintech/credit domain, APIs.


Qualification


	7 years of experience in techniocal product management.


Core Skills


	Faster credit decisions, improved financial inclusion
	Business Impact.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Technical Product Manager – CredTech Job at BlueChip Technologies

We are recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

job Location: Lagos

title: Business Development Executive Job at the Vault Recruitment
content:
The Vault Recruitment - Our client in the Construction Chemicals / Building Materials / Finishing Products industry is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive

Vacancy Code: MEG002
Job Locations: Abuja (FCT), Ibadan - Oyo, Onitsha / Asaba - Anambra, Kano, Akure - Ondo
Job type: Full -Time
Industry: Construction Chemicals / Building Materials / Finishing Products
Work Structure: Remote / Field-Based (Regional Market Development Role)

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	‎Our client is seeking highly driven Business Development Executives to establish strong commercial presence across assigned regions and drive project acquisition within the construction ecosystem.


‎Key Responsibilities


	‎Develop strong relationships with developers, contractors, architects, consultants, quantity surveyors, procurement teams, and applicators
	‎Identify and track active and upcoming construction projects within assigned regions
	‎Drive opportunities within flooring, waterproofing, skim coat, rendering, and finishing projects
	‎Conduct site visits, technical-commercial meetings, product presentations, sample submissions, and trial coordination
	‎5Coordinate project execution support with the head office
	‎Provide market intelligence, competitor analysis, pipeline reports, and project tracking updates


Requirements


	‎4–7 years of relevant industry experience.
	‎Strong network within the construction ecosystem in assigned region.
	‎Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
	‎Strong communication and reporting skills.
	‎Comfortable with extensive field work and site visits.
	‎Proven ability to identify and develop project opportunities.


Salary
N100,000 – N180,000 monthly.    

    

        Click here to Apply
